title: Road Damage Detection and Classification for Kazakhstan Road Imagery
description: Code, manifests, annotations, reports, and Ghost-CA-YOLO experiment tooling for a Kazakhstan road-damage detection and classification study. The release excludes raw third-party images and RDD2022 image archives; users reconstruct local image caches from recorded source URLs and download RDD2022 separately from its official source.
